goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 09:30' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'norwich' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 0' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The hotel should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 09:30 and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to norwich and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get price and travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 0 and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number and address
